hardFail.message: Article is shorter than the configured word range
Article mentions a certification, standard, lab test, or compliance claim not found in site.json or knowledge.json.
Article claims factory scale, capacity, equipment, years of experience, or export markets without source data.
Article includes a customer case, project result, client name, or metric not found in case study data.
Article mentions exact lead time, MOQ, sample time, price, or shipping terms without source data.
B2B article must include a procurement-oriented CTA.
B2B article must end with a company/team credibility block.
B2B article uses consumer hype, cheap/best/easy claims, or vague promotional language.

warnings.message: Some required primary or secondary keywords were not naturally covered in the article.
Article does not clearly address procurement, engineering, contractor, distributor, or business buyer concerns.
A B2B product or supplier article should include a specs, selection criteria, or comparison table when relevant.
No link to a product, solution, case study, certification, or contact/RFQ page.
No procurement FAQ detected for MOQ, lead time, customization, sample, drawing, packaging, or shipping.
